nasb.text: All these your servants will come down to me and bow themselves before me, saying, ‘Go out, you and all the people who follow you,’ and after that I will go out.” And he went out from Pharaoh in hot anger.

esv.text: And all these your servants shall come down to me and bow down to me, saying, ‘Get out, you and all the people who follow you.’ And after that I will go out.” And he went out from Pharaoh in hot anger.

cnv.text: 你所有的臣僕都必下到我這裡來，向我下跪說：‘你和所有跟從你的人民都出去吧’，然後我才出去。”於是摩西氣忿忿地離開法老出去了。

ccb.text: 到那天，你所有的臣仆都要来俯伏在我面前，求我和跟随我的百姓离开这里。那时我才会离开。’”摩西说完便怒气冲冲地离开法老。
